name: Alsation Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F.
2. Generously butter a 12-inch cake pan or 10-inch springform pan.
3. Peel, core, and cut the apples into eighths. Place in a large bowl.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together the eggs, honey, oil, milk, vanilla extract, and rum.
5. Add the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt to the wet mixture. Blend well until combined.
6. Pour the batter over the apples and toss everything together.
7. Turn the mixture into the buttered baking pan.
8. Bake for 30 minutes.
9. Meanwhile, mix together the topping ingredients (1 egg, 2 tablespoons melted butter, and 2 tablespoons brown sugar).
10. After 30 minutes of baking, pour the topping over the cake and spread evenly.
11. Return to the oven and bake an additional 20 minutes until caramelized on top.
12. Cool in the pan on a rack. Serve warm or cool. Reheats well.
